summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cuore Artigiano Pinterest-style artisan gallery. Backend APIs functional, frontend displays correctly with Italian interface, but navigation issues found.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 when creating works
minor_bugs.impact: Functional but incorrect HTTP status code

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation to work detail page not working - clicking work cards doesn't navigate

integration_issues.issue: Nested anchor tags causing navigation failure and React hydration warnings

console_warnings.issue: HTML validation warnings about nested <a> tags in WorkCard component
console_warnings.impact: Causes React hydration errors and prevents proper navigation

passed_tests: Home page loads with Pinterest-style masonry grid
Category filters work correctly (Tutti, Orecchini, Collane, etc.)
Google login button present with Italian text
Work cards display with artisan info
All interface text is in Italian
Demo works display when no real works exist
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix nested anchor tag structure in WorkCard component causing navigation failure. The issue is that Link components are nested inside other Link components, creating invalid HTML and preventing navigation to work detail pages.
